Chronology of every recorded fact about [[soulfire]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Soulfire is a gray-white, half-transparent flame that is perfectly round and spins slowly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Daishou uses stockpiled soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Soulfire can be used to make mundane materials like iron stronger and allow them to conduct madra and aura more efficiently.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Soulfire is a gray, almost colorless flame that can be ignited on fingertips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Soulfire is a type of energy used to fuel seals.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Underlords and above have their bodies reforged by soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Soulfire is a type of energy/power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan can use soulfire to empower his Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon will need to reforge his body and spirit in soulfire after Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Soulfire burns away impurities, refines the physical vessel, and empowers madra.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Soulfire is a by-product of connecting to the world around you.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Soulfire is considered the real mark of an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Underlords burn treasures for soulfire to progress through advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Kiro drew on his reserve of soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Soulfire is a type of energy Yerin can weave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Soulfire is absorbed by emerald madra leaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Soulfire is present in Lindon's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Soulfire rebuilds a person's lifeline during advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's soulfire forms a bridge between his spirit and the aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Soulfire can be injected into the Titan’s Blade technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Kiro released a Striker technique from his left hand by pouring soulfire into it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon uses soulfire to retreat the pressure of sword aura.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon uses gray soulfire in conjunction with pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The dragon resonates with its soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan's pure madra was reinforced with soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Pride pours madra and soulfire into a blow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Sophara uses soulfire to assist her Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Soulfire is a type of enhancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Sage's technique involves concentrated aura, madra, and soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon pours soulfire into his right hand.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Adama's body has been thrice reborn in soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Soulfire can be infused into techniques to make them larger and brighter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sha Miara uses soulfire-controlled aura to hurl a piano.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sophara taps into her soulfire to begin advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Underlords advance by condensing their soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan's soulfire resonates with surrounding aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel has already passed his soulfire revelations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara used soulfire to push away a dream aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Yerin creates a bridge between her soulfire and the artifacts around her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara has control over soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Soulfire empowers Yerin's Flowing Sword.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan used soulfire to strengthen his Archlord body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin is filling her swords with madra and soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Soulfire expands Orthos's body as it burns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Soulfire is a substance or energy needed to reverse Orthos's size.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan used up his soulfire to heal himself.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Soulfire is required for Orthos to grow and shrink.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin reinforces her grass darts with soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon uses soulfire to manipulate air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — The ways of soulfire are unknown to Truegolds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long can use soulfire to burst techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon fused a loop of dream madra to Dross' spirit using soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin uses soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Soulfire bathes Lindon's technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan poured soulfire into his defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy can control the air with her soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Soulfire is a power Lindon considers using.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel burns through soulfire to power his abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon used a soulfire-infused Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon wants more soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Soulfire is a power running through Jai Long's veins.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Soulfire is needed to help Orthos reach Archlord.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Little Blue can handle another dose of Lindon's soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy stores sparks of soulfire while cycling madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's soulfire dipped low.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Archlord natural treasures turned into soulfire in Orthos's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Soulfire is a silver rush of energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon uses soulfire in his Blackflame blast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Reigan burned soulfire to transform into his original form.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Soulfire gave birth to Reigan's Lord body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen ignites his soulfire to begin a transformation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Meira spins soulfire during her training.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
